creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
For some reason, this produces build errors in tinderbox for me:

install  -o root -g wheel -m 555 /a/ports/sysutils/xen-tools/files/xe_wrapper /usr/local/sbin
install: /a/ports/sysutils/xen-tools/files/xe_wrapper: No such file or directory
*** [do-install] Error code 71
Any ideas?

Steve
